title: Usoland and the Underground Rebellion
description: Pages 1–4 focus on usoland and the underground rebellion, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Fujitora, Marines, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10 as the Tontatta prepare their plan against Doflamingo while Franky, the Toy Soldier, and the rebels reveal Dressrosa’s hidden suffering.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Joker!! Hurry up! This bastard, take him D-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cough!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There's no way I'm handing this guy over....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Because you haven't stuck to our agreement in the least!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Doflamingo! You've brought these dealings back to square one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: gyahhh!! What are you saying, you ass!! After coming this far....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fuffuffu!!!! Is that any way to talk to your old boss after not writing for ten years!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hand him over!!! Caesar is my precious underlying!!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: ISSHO-SAN, THE ONE WITH LAW IS CAESAR CLOWN.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Jo - Ker!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Is that so ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: that, uh... scientist involved with the poison gas incident

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But there's still that it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As long as he serves under a ski- Chibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Then he's exempted... a full pardon ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fuffu Fu!! You ...

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: You received a special appointment to the position of Admiral under the "World Consumption." Fujitora, I've heard a lot about you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Along with ryokugyu, you're said to be a certified powerhouse of Mon- Strous proportions

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You honor me too greatly ....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hmmmph!! Don't play the fool, you bastard ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: I'm still a newcomer to the Marines... and I'm having trouble under- standing your actions

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We don't have all the evidence yet

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But it seems that as a shichibukai, you've broken some rules

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Or so says the information I've received...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Earlier, that man over there was addressing you...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: as "Joker." ...Is that a nickname of some sort?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fuffuffu! If you want to come after me... you'd better be well-prepared

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: with nothing less than a heap of evidence!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Fuffu ... well? You marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Have you decided on how to deal with law?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: In regards to the reported matter of the Strawhat crew

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If indeed they have all allied, as the newspaper said, then law is "black"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But if they... if they have merely become your underlings,law, then you are "white" !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Depending on your answer... our mission may entail...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The arrest of you and the Strawhat crew

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oi, what a weird way to judge...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But if you lie then it's all over, here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The gears have really gone awry... so I was the target all along?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Even if I bring the fight to Dressrosa

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The situation will only worsen

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Strawhat and I are equals in this matter !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've just got to buy some time

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Just as the report said, it's an alliance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FuffuffUFUFFU FUFFU FU! What a foolish man you are

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on usoland and the underground rebellion, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
